title: Zervan Query Envelope Manifest
description: Canonical, signed representation of a Zervan query envelope. Declares canonicalization rules and binds evidence, execution artifacts, outputs, and cryptographic attestations.

signature_scope.description: Signing mode for this manifest. v1.1.0 requires full_envelope signing.

canonicalization.description: Declares the canonical byte representation rules used for hashing and signing.

query.description: Canonical description of the query being executed.

evidence.description: Referenced evidence artifacts and their hashes.

execution.description: IR hash, conductor hash, and execution metadata.

outputs.description: Produced outputs and their hashes (prefer CAS refs, not inline payloads).

policy_ref.description: Reference or hash of the effective crypto policy applied.

signed_hash.description: SHA-512 of canonical bytes for the full manifest.

signatures.description: Signatures over the raw 64-byte SHA-512 digest of the canonicalized manifest.

alg.description: Signature algorithm identifier (must be permitted by crypto_policy.yaml).

signer_key_id.description: Key identifier / fingerprint for the signer.

signature_b64.description: Base64 signature bytes over the raw SHA-512 digest.

cert_chain_ref.description: Optional CAS reference to certificate chain material.

crypto.description: Cryptographic binding: policy + canonical hash + signature attestations.
